subheadline: A small, opinionated toolkit that keeps content fast to edit and consistent to maintain.

items.title: Side-by-side live preview
items.description_text: See every field change render instantly, no separate preview tab.

items.title: One source of truth for styling
items.description_text: Design tokens drive colour, spacing, and radius across all blocks.

items.title: Accessible defaults
items.description_text: Landmarks, heading order, and focus states ship with each element.

items.title: Clean, semantic markup
items.description_text: Output stays valid and lightweight, with no framework lock-in.
